## What you'd like to do

## Why the existing tool doesn't cover it

<!-- What's the workaround today? Why is it bad? -->

## Sketch (optional)

<!-- Example CLI shape, schema change, or behavior — whatever's clearest. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways you could solve this and why you chose the proposed shape. -->

## Scope check
